overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval harbor town. The character moves from a cobblestone street through a guarded gate onto wooden docks along the waterfront, passing various NPCs and cargo storage areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone harbor street with cargo storage

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone harbor street toward the gate, passing wooden cargo crates and barrels

notable_agents.action: civilian in red dress walking along the path

entered.detail: Large wooden barrels stacked near the dock entrance
Yellow canvas sacks piled on wooden pallets
Stone archway gate with wooden doors leading to the docks
Traditional medieval half-timbered houses with steep roofs

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit cobblestone street lined with half-timbered buildings. Wooden barrels and canvas cargo sacks are stacked along the right side near the waterfront, while the stone harbor gate looms ahead in the distance.

events.description: Entering the stone gate structure from the open cobblestone street
Transitioning from stone floor to wooden dock planks while passing through the gate

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the harbor gate, passing guards in red armor carrying halberds and pikes

notable_agents.action: Guard in red armor and helmet walking through the gate carrying a halberd
Second guard in red armor standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: Weathered wooden planks of the dock walkway
Heavy wooden portcullis and gate structure
Calm water of the harbor visible through the gate archway

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the fortified stone gate, moving from the open street into the sheltered archway. Guards in red armor patrol the entrance as the ground transitions from cobblestone to wooden dock planks, with the harbor water becoming visible through the gate.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock walkway along waterfront

events.description: Moving from open gate area onto covered wooden dock section with overhead beams
Large wooden support pillar temporarily blocks the view of the harbor

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the covered wooden dock beside the harbor water, passing under wooden support beams

notable_agents.action: Civilian in orange tunic walking along the dock wall

entered.detail: Thick wooden posts supporting the dock roof overhead
Red-roofed towers and fortifications visible across the water
Wooden barrels stored against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the sheltered wooden dock, passing under thick support beams that create dappled shadows. The harbor water stretches out to the right with distant castle towers visible across the bay, while wooden barrels line the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: open harbor dock with crane and market activity

events.description: Exiting the covered dock area into open waterfront with full sky visibility
Passing by children sitting on the dock edge next to the water

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the open waterfront dock, passing various NPCs including children and dock workers near a large crane

notable_agents.action: Child in blue dress sitting on the dock edge near the water
Guard in red armor walking along the stone church building

entered.detail: Tall wooden crane structure with rope and pulley for loading cargo
Large stone church with arched windows and red roof tiles
Steps leading down from the dock to the water level

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, Geralt enters a bright open dock area with a large wooden cargo crane dominating the center. A stone church rises on the left while children sit on the dock edge to the right, and the harbor water reflects the sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit medieval street through a fortified gateway and onto an open harbor waterfront. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path lined with half-timbered buildings and stacked cargo sacks, moving steadily toward a looming stone harbor gate. As he passes through the sheltered archway, the camera tracks past guards in red armor while the ground transitions from stone to wooden dock planks. The scene then shifts into a covered walkway where dappled shadows fall across the path, revealing the harbor water and distant castle towers to the right. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a bright, open dock area dominated by a large wooden cargo crane, with a stone church and children resting by the sun-reflecting water.
